Id1.text: Addis Ababa City Hall is 42 m high and houses the Government of Addis Ababa.

Id2.text: The " Government of Addis Ababa" are the current tenants of Addis Ababa City Hall which is 42 metres high.

Id3.text: Addis Ababa City Hall is 42 m high and is occupied by the Government of Addis Adaba.
